author: dashboard-bootstrap
content:
Fix on branch fix/738-bootstrap-auto-complete-on-register (off develop). Changes:
1. sync/trust.rs: register_active_key_as_trusted now returns Result<bool> and, when it adds a new entry while bootstrap.status=='pending', calls complete_bootstrap() and stages meta/bootstrap.json into the same unsigned commit.
2. sync/bootstrap.rs: added 'trust: register signing key' to BOOTSTRAP_MESSAGE_PREFIXES so the unsigned self-trust commit is correctly filtered by signing audit.
3. commands/locks_cmd.rs sync_cmd: snapshot bootstrap state before/after configure_signing and print 'Bootstrap complete — signing enforcement is now active.' (parity with trust approve).
4. sync/tests.rs: two new unit tests prove (a) first configure_signing call flips bootstrap pending->complete and writes completed_at, (b) subsequent calls leave completed_at unchanged.
Verification: cargo build clean; cargo fmt clean; cargo clippy clean; 145 sync:: tests pass.
